title: CritTweaks
description: Tweak your crit and sharpness particles - force them, multiply them, and more!
body:
![crittweaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67d17111988dd2334d602fb8b9210a5420c77402.png)

**CritTweaks** gives you more control over Minecraft's critical-hit and sharpness particles. This lightweight client-side mod lets you customize how particles appear.

Everything is purely visual and only affects what **you** see.

## Features

CritTweaks provides separate settings for **Critical Hit** particles and **Sharpness (Enchanted Hit)** particles, allowing complete customization of both effects.

| Option                                           | Description                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Force Crit/Sharpness Particles**               | Displays particles even when Minecraft's particle setting is set to **Minimal** or when they are disabled by other mods.                                             |
| **Always Crit/Sharpness Particles**              | Shows particles on every hit you land, regardless of whether the hit was actually a critical hit or sharpness-triggered hit. |
| **Hide Other Players' Crit/Sharpness Particles** | Only displays particles from hits that you land yourself, hiding particles generated by other players.                       |
| **Hide Crit/Sharpness Particles On Yourself**    | Prevents particles from appearing when you are hit by another player or mob.                                                 |
| **Crit/Sharpness Particle Multiplier**           | Increases the number of particles spawned for stronger visual feedback.                                                      |
